agent_hint: Distil FAQ candidates out of a conversation with the LLM. The caller supplies only the target knowledge base; the candidates land in draft for human review and nothing reaches the knowledge base until someone approves and publishes them. Returning zero candidates is a legitimate result — most conversations contain no reusable Q&A.
precondition_description: The conversation must have messages, and a target knowledge base must be given.
side_effect_description: Calls the tenant's LLM and creates faq_candidate rows in draft. Re-running replaces this service's own previous drafts and leaves anything a human already decided alone.
output_description: Returns how many candidates were created, and the candidates themselves.

agent_hint: Correct the question or answer text of a FAQ candidate before it is approved. Does not change the review status.
precondition_description: Candidate must still be in draft status.

agent_hint: Approve a FAQ candidate. Transitions draft to approved and stamps the reviewer and review time. Approving does NOT write to the knowledge base — run faq:publish for that.
precondition_description: Candidate must be in draft status.
output_description: Returns the updated candidate with approved status.

agent_hint: Reject a FAQ candidate with a reason. Transitions draft to rejected. The candidate is never written to the knowledge base.
precondition_description: Candidate must be in draft status.
output_description: Returns the updated candidate with rejected status and the reason recorded.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认将该问答发布到知识库？发布后智能体检索时即可召回。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Publish this Q&A into the knowledge base? The agent will start recalling it.

agent_hint: Publish an approved FAQ candidate into its target knowledge base. Writes an ab_kb_document with source_type=conversation, stores the resulting document pid back on the candidate, and moves it to published. Idempotent: re-publishing the same candidate replaces its document rather than creating a second one. Persistence is owned by the platform FaqCandidateCommandHandler.
precondition_description: Candidate must be in approved status and carry a target knowledge base.
side_effect_description: Creates (or replaces) a document in the target knowledge base and embeds its chunks, making the FAQ retrievable by the agent.
output_description: Returns the updated candidate with published status and the kb document pid filled in.
